name: Ulinda Park BESS
notable: 155 MW / 298 MWh BESS in Queensland's Western Downs near Hopeland. Stage 1 of a project approved to reach 350 MW / 1,078 MWh. Developed by Akaysha Energy (BlackRock). Powin battery stacks with Eks Energy inverters. Portfolio financing alongside Brendale BESS was Australia's first multi-project battery financing.

timeline.title: Construction begins
timeline.detail: Akaysha Energy commenced construction of 155MW/298MWh BESS using Powin battery systems and EKS Energy power conversion at Condamine, QLD.

timeline.title: Commercial operations commenced
timeline.detail: Commencement date from AEMO registration via OpenElectricity.

timeline.title: First generation recorded
timeline.detail: First market dispatch data recorded in AEMO systems.

timeline.title: Phase 1 goes online
timeline.detail: Ulinda Park Phase 1 commenced operations. Akaysha/Powin/EKS celebrated GPS approval milestone. Powin bankruptcy (June 2025) creates long-term warranty concerns.

timeline.title: COD estimate updated
timeline.detail: COD changed from 2026-01 to 2026-01-13 (source: AEMO Generation Information)
